_comment: Shared knowledge base for the Interactive Tech Stack cards AND the clickable architecture node modals. Keep honest.

tech.name: Docker
tech.description: Containerize apps into small, secure, reproducible images.
tech.purpose: Package the app and its dependencies into a portable, reproducible image.
tech.config: Multi-stage Dockerfile, non-root user, HEALTHCHECK, .dockerignore, pinned base images.
tech.implementation: Built multi-stage images for the FastAPI backend and Next.js frontend and pushed them to GHCR via CI.

tech.name: Kubernetes
tech.description: Orchestrate containers with scaling, self-healing and rolling updates.
tech.purpose: Run and scale containerized services with self-healing and zero-downtime rollouts.
tech.config: Deployments, Services, Ingress, HPA, ConfigMaps/Secrets via kustomize + a Helm chart.
tech.implementation: Authored k8s manifests (kustomize) and a Helm chart with probes, HPA and secret templates.

tech.name: AWS
tech.description: Provision and operate cloud infrastructure built for scale and resilience.
tech.purpose: Host compute, storage, CDN and DNS for production workloads.
tech.config: EC2 compute in a VPC, S3 for assets, CloudFront CDN, Route53 DNS, SSL.
tech.implementation: Provisioned and operated EC2/S3/CloudFront/Route53 with VPC networking and SSL.

tech.name: Oracle Cloud
tech.description: ARM compute for self-hosting containerized workloads.
tech.purpose: Provide an always-on ARM box to self-host the containerized stack.
tech.config: Oracle Cloud ARM instance (24 GB RAM), Docker, Nginx reverse proxy, SSL.
tech.implementation: Provisioned an ARM instance and prepared it to host the Dockerized stack (deployment in progress).

tech.name: Prometheus
tech.description: Scrape and store time-series metrics from every service.
tech.purpose: Collect and store metrics so the system is observable.
tech.config: Scrape configs targeting service /metrics endpoints, alerting rules on SLOs.
tech.implementation: Exposed /metrics via the FastAPI instrumentator and scraped it with Prometheus.

tech.name: Grafana
tech.description: Visualize metrics and alerts in operational dashboards.
tech.purpose: Turn raw metrics into dashboards and alerts engineers actually use.
tech.config: Provisioned datasource + dashboards reading from Prometheus.
tech.implementation: Wired Grafana to Prometheus to visualize service health and request metrics.

tech.name: FastAPI
tech.purpose: Serve the application's REST API and orchestrate AI calls.
tech.config: Routers, Pydantic schemas, CORS, /health and /metrics endpoints.
tech.implementation: Built the interview/scoring API: routers, services, persistence and LLM orchestration.

tech.name: Python
tech.description: Primary language for backend, automation and AI integration.
tech.purpose: Implement backend logic, automation and AI integrations.
tech.config: Typed Python, virtual environments, pinned requirements.
tech.implementation: Wrote the backends, the Jarvis assistant core and the AI integration layers in Python.

tech.name: Next.js
tech.description: Build fast, SEO-friendly React frontends (App Router).
tech.purpose: Render the interview dashboard UI and this portfolio.
tech.config: App Router, standalone/static export, Tailwind, TypeScript.
tech.implementation: Built the AI Interview Bot dashboard and this statically-exported portfolio.

tech.name: Redis
tech.description: In-memory cache for hot data and sessions.
tech.purpose: Cache hot retrievals and sessions to cut latency.
tech.config: Redis as a caching layer in front of expensive retrievals.
tech.implementation: Used Redis to cache hot RAG retrievals and session state in the support platform.

tech.name: Qdrant
tech.description: Vector database for semantic search and RAG.
tech.purpose: Store embeddings and retrieve relevant context for RAG answers.
tech.config: Per-tenant namespaced collections, embeddings ingestion pipeline.
tech.implementation: Indexed knowledge-base chunks in Qdrant and retrieved top-k context for grounded answers.

tech.name: GitHub Actions
tech.description: Automate build, test, scan and deploy pipelines.
tech.purpose: Turn every push into a tested, scanned, deployed artifact.
tech.config: Matrix lint/test/build jobs, buildx cache, Trivy scan, GHCR + Pages deploy.
tech.implementation: Authored CI/CD for the AI bot (build→test→scan→GHCR) and this site's Pages deploy.
